hero.title: Hi, I'm
hero.description: Full Stack Developer experienced with Java, Spring Boot, Vue.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, PostgreSQL and MySQL.
hero.stack: Vue.js • React • TypeScript • Java • Spring Boot

about.title: Developer focused on modern web solutions.
about.p1: I am a software developer with experience in full-stack web development, working with technologies such as Java, Spring Boot, Vue.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, PostgreSQL and MySQL.
about.p2: I graduated in Systems Analysis and Development from FATEC São José dos Campos in 2024 and have experience across frontend, backend, API development, database management and software maintenance.
about.p3: I currently work as a Senior Developer at ARCI Inteligência Imobiliária, contributing to tenant analysis and real estate technology solutions, working on frontend and backend features, integrations, system architecture decisions and product improvements.
about.p4: I value teamwork, communication and continuous learning, aiming to deliver reliable, scalable solutions aligned with business needs.

jobs.description: Development of tenant analysis and real estate technology solutions, working on frontend and backend features, integrations, architecture decisions and product improvements.
Development of web applications using TypeScript, Vue.js and related technologies, working on frontend, APIs, business rules and platform improvements.
Frontend and backend development, API integrations, bug fixing, feature implementation and participation in requirements gathering.
Support in requirements gathering, solution prototyping, frontend and backend development and system maintenance.

items.title: Test of English for International Communication (TOEIC)
ARCI Inteligência Imobiliária
items.description: Platform focused on tenant analysis and risk management for real estate companies. I contributed to product evolution by implementing frontend and backend features, API integrations, authentication, dashboards and improvements focused on scalability and user experience.

items.title: Restricted Areas Monitoring System
items.description: API project developed in partnership with Altave during my graduation at FATEC. The system uses image analysis for automatic monitoring of restricted areas, contributing to security and access control.

contact.title: Let's talk?
contact.description: I am open to opportunities, projects and professional connections.
